title: Tool Smithing Upgrades
description: A small mod to allow generating lots of Smithing recipes between different materials
body:
Tool smithing upgrades is a datadriven recipe generation mod.
In short if you make a smithingupgrades/smithing_table_materials folder and put files with the following the same formate example json from the wiki in you can generate smithing recipes between your material and any existing material.

It's entirely server side, but can also be used in single player worlds
